title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: During a day out with Copano Rickey...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ah, Trainer! Hold on a moment!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Over there! It's one of those cuties machines!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look in the direction Copano Rickey is pointing
and see a claw machine filled with Umamusume
plushies.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
They're sooo cute. If I got a bunch of them, I bet
my sisters would be super happy!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I haven't had the chance to spend much time with
them since coming to Tracen Academy. They must
be feeling pretty lonely.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna give it a shot! Presents, here I
come!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Argh! I can't catch a single one... This game is
really difficult...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to throw in the towel. I'll study up on how
to play and try my luck another day.
choice_data_list: Looks like it's my time to step up!
Looks like it's my time to step up!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you going to win some for me?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, thanks! Here's hoping you get a whole
bunch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
